response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior engineer with ~15 years of production software experience, solid TypeScript/Node.js and cloud (AWS CDK) skills, and directly relevant recent work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow tooling. However, the role requires 8+ years building AI-driven solutions, and the candidate's demonstrable GenAI experience spans roughly one year. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, or LLM optimization work, and no clear enterprise customer-facing delivery track record at the level a Staff Forward Deployed Engineer role demands.
strengths: Recent hands-on MCP and AI-agent infrastructure work, directly matching key technologies
Deep full-stack production experience with TypeScript, Node.js, AWS, and high-throughput systems
Proven communicator: workshops, conference talks, and multi-day courses suggest customer-facing potential
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions (~1 year of GenAI work)
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience
No evidence of leading technical discovery with enterprise stakeholders or forward-deployed delivery
